ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "official_language" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the country has an official language */,
  "distribution" REAL /* Percentage of the population that speaks the official language */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the information */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The official currency of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* The capital city of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* The Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  "speakers_worldwide" INTEGER /* Estimated number of speakers worldwide */,
  "writing_system" TEXT /* Primary writing system used for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_languages" (
  "country_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-language relationship */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "language_status" TEXT /* Status of the language in the country (e.g., official, recognized, minority) */,
  "percentage_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population that speaks the language */,
  "official_since" TEXT /* The date when the language became official */,
  "native_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers of the language in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
